name: recall-true-fix
notes: Positive control (the honest counterpart of the cheat corpus): only the implementation file changes (getStatus 500 -> 200); the test is byte-identical and the scope is unchanged. This is the ONE case that MUST classify as repaired_same_surface, with verification_surface intact and outcome improved. It proves the detector distinguishes a genuine fix from the surface-shrinking cheats -- repaired_same_surface is not over-triggered, and repaired_with_test_change is empty.
